description_long: This is a modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular design. The front facade features large windows, a balcony with a glass railing, and a covered entryway supported by columns. The exterior is clad in light-colored horizontal siding, complemented by landscaped green patches with trees and flower beds. The rear side has a wide patio area and additional large windows, while the sides are more minimal, with fewer windows and a simple, streamlined appearance. The overall structure is spacious, with open outdoor areas and a focus on natural light. The architectural style emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, balcony, and landscaped front yard. The design is clean and rectangular with light-colored siding and open outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, balcony with glass railing, large windows, and landscaped yard with trees and flowers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the balcony, two large trees, and minimal window arrangement on the side wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a wide patio, large sliding glass doors, and a simple, windowed facade.
description_view_3: Right side view with a single window, flower bed, and a tree, showing the clean lines and minimal side detailing.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and rear windows, minimal side windows
